case_title: DOMITILA GUTIERREZ VS. CARLOS C. BARRIOS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DOMITILA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARRIOS, CARLOS C. BARRIOS INVESTMENTS, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ, DOMITILA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CARLOS BARRIOS---OWNER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
